source_jobs.title: Senior Platform Engineer - AWS - Team Platform (d/f/m)
source_jobs.description:
WHAT IS WORKING AT BETTERMILE LIKE?

 - We mean it when we say “cutting edge” and have a high level of creative freedom in our everyday work

 - You will be surrounded by like-minded, driven, skilled, and highly motivated people who are keen to contribute to successful solutions

 - We mean diversity, and we put it in numbers: 130+ people, 40 languages, 40% female (vs. ø26% in the tech industry), ø33 years of age, and yes, we do have Schlager-Fans among us

 - We have a very supportive and appreciative working environment with a lot of autonomy, a flat hierarchy, and professional growth possibilities

 - We work in a hybrid mode, with weekly team days for better collaboration and nurturing interpersonal connections. When onsite, we work in a modern, kid- and pet-friendly Better Space in the heart of Berlin-Kreuzberg

 - Remote work from anywhere for up to 12 weeks in total per year

 - 30 vacation days in a 5-day/week working model

 - Kindergarten grant and a Company Pension scheme

 - Regular team breakfasts, fitness & wellness classes, company runs, and other events. Fruits, snacks, drinks, and coffee with a variety of milk are a given - but yes, we have them

 - Outstanding flexibility we are proud of – and, of course, the best colleagues in the world!



About the Platform Team

Every product team's ability to move fast depends on what's running underneath it. The Platform team builds that foundation for Bettermile, from shared infrastructure and authentication to observability, alerting, and developer tooling, so product teams can build, deploy, operate, and secure their products with confidence. The Platform Team's mission is to empower product teams by minimizing their cognitive load, so they can move faster and deliver more business value to our customers.



You will be joining a highly impactful role where you will balance hands-on technical execution (approx. 60%) with strategic stakeholder engagement and mentorship (approx. 40%).



Our current tech stack: AWS(CDK, EC2, ECS, S3, EventBridge, SQS, Location Services, API Gateway), Pulumi, Kotlin, New Relic, Snowflake, PagerDuty, GitHub, GitHub Actions, GitHub Copilot and Claude Code.




YOU WILL BE TAKING CARE OF

 - Driving the evolution and stabilization of our central authentication systems

 - Taking ownership of our infrastructure's observability, scalability, security, and cost-efficiency, in close collaboration with teams and stakeholders

 - Implementing infrastructure-as-code across our ecosystems

 - Providing Mentorship for platform senior engineers, guiding their professional growth, and fostering strong cross-team collaboration

 - Implementing the company vision by championing DevOps culture, and establishing platform engineering best practices across the organization

 - No echo chambers here! You will challenge technical directions constructively and share your insights openly, while always being a team player who fully backs the squad's final decisions




YOU CHECK THESE BOXES

 - Deep proficiency and hands-on experience operating within AWS environment

 - Strong background in system operations, specifically with Linux/Unix

 - Fluency in a programming language such as Python or similar

 - A minimum of 2 years of proven experience actively mentoring other engineers and putting them on a successful growth path

 - Security-minded approach to platform engineering

 - A proven ability to constructively challenge viewpoints while consistently aligning with the best interests of the organization

 - A strong preference for a hybrid setup that blends remote flexibility with 2 days of on-site collaboration in our Kreuzberg office




IT IS AWESOME IF YOU ALSO HAVE

 - Experience with AI workloads, ML Ops, AWS Bedrock, Agentcore, or Snowflake Cortex

 - Proven experience leading large-scale infrastructure migration projects spanning multiple teams

 - AWS certifications


TAKE YOUR CHANCE

Be a part of shaping a fast-growing industry and make an impact

source_jobs.title: Working Student Frontend Engineer (TypeScript) (d/f/m)
source_jobs.description:
Fixed-term contract: 12 months, with the possibility of extension based on mutual agreement.




WHAT IS WORKING AT BETTERMILE LIKE?

 - We have a very supportive and appreciative working environment with a lot of autonomy, a flat hierarchy, and professional growth possibilities.

 - We mean diversity and we put it in numbers: 29 languages, 32 nationalities, 42% female (vs. ø26% in tech industry), and yes, we do have Schlager-Fans among us.

 - You can quickly take on responsibility without feeling left alone. Your team is always at your side.

 - We mean it when we say “cutting edge” and have a high level of creational freedom in our everyday work.

 - We work in a hybrid mode with weekly team days for better collaboration and nurturing interpersonal connections. When onsite - we work in a modern kid & pet-friendly Better Space in the heart of Berlin-Kreuzberg.

 - Remote work from anywhere for up to 12 weeks in total in a year.

 - Enjoy 27 vacation days (with a 5-day week model)

 - Regular team breakfasts, fitness & wellness classes, company runs, and other events. Fruits, snacks, drinks, and coffee with a variety of milk are a given - but yes, we have them.

 - Outstanding flexibility we are proud of – and of course, the best colleagues in the world!
   
   

About Better Planner https://bettermile.com/planner/ Tribe:

Better Planner is the newest product in the Bettermile suite, built to redefine how logistics operations plan, predict, and execute. Our mission is to turn complex operational data into precise, automated decisions. AI that solves essential, real-world problems at scale. You will be part of an experienced, fast-moving, highly collaborative, and flat-hierarchy team.




YOU WILL BE TAKING CARE OF

As a Working Student Frontend Engineer, you won’t just be watching from the sidelines. You’ll be shipping real code, tackling modern tech stacks, and growing your skills. Here is what you will focus on:

 - Implement clean, reusable UI components to our ongoing design system migration.

 - Move past isolated tasks and build frontend features from scratch, backed by the dedicated mentorship and guidance of our senior engineers.

 - Get hands-on experience with cutting-edge tech by actively contributing to the development and evolution of our team’s AI framework.

 - Conduct technical investigations and research to help the team evaluate new tools, experiment with solutions, and unblock performance bottlenecks.

 - Keep our user experience smooth and reliable by troubleshooting, refactoring, and resolving well-scoped frontend challenges.
   
   


YOU CHECK THESE BOXES

We know you are still studying, so we don't expect you to know everything. For us, specific tools can be taught, but the right attitude is irreplaceable. Here is what we are looking for:




YOUR TECH FOUNDATION

 - You have a solid grasp of HTML and CSS, and you know how to structure a clean webpage.

 - You possess good knowledge of JavaScript or TypeScript and feel comfortable navigating modern JS concepts.

 - You have at least a basic understanding of a modern frontend framework like React or Vue (even if it's from a personal or university project).


YOUR MINDSET

 - Resourceful & Time-Aware: You have a "dig-first" mentality. When faced with a bug, you love trying to crack it autonomously, but you also practice timeboxing, knowing exactly when to stop spinning your wheels and ask a senior for a hint.

 - Proactive Communicator: You don't work in a silo. You loop people in early, ask questions when you're stuck, and keep the team updated on your progress.

 - Curious Beyond the Classroom: Your interest in tech doesn't stop when class ends. You are genuinely curious and love exploring tech, reading blogs, or messing around with side projects outside of your studies.




IT IS AWESOME IF YOU ALSO HAVE

 - You already use modern AI assistants like GitHub Copilot or Claude Code to supercharge your coding workflow, debug faster, and accelerate your le

source_jobs.title: Can’t find your role? (Open Application)
source_jobs.description:
If you love solving complex, real-world puzzles but have not found a role that fits you well, we would still want to hear from you. Whatever your superpower is, if you care about making last-mile parcel logistics better, you belong here, let's chat!




WHAT DO WE USUALLY OFFER AT BETTERMILE?

 - We mean it when we say “cutting edge” and have a high level of creative freedom in our everyday work.

 - You will be surrounded by like-minded, driven, skilled, and highly motivated people who are keen to contribute to successful solutions.

 - We mean diversity, and we put it in numbers: 130+ people, 36 languages, 35% female (vs. ø26% in the tech industry), ø33 years of age, and yes, we do have Schlager-Fans among us.

 - We have a very supportive and appreciative working environment with a lot of autonomy, a flat hierarchy, and professional growth possibilities.

 - We usually work in a hybrid mode, with weekly team days for better collaboration and nurturing interpersonal connections. When onsite, we work in a modern, kid- and pet-friendly Better Space in the heart of Berlin-Kreuzberg.

 - Remote work from anywhere for up to 12 weeks in total per year.

 - Kindergarten grant and a Company Pension scheme.

 - Regular team breakfasts, fitness & wellness classes, company runs, and other events. Fruits, snacks, drinks, and coffee with a variety of milk are a given - but yes, we have them.

 - Outstanding flexibility we are proud of – and, of course, the best colleagues in the world!


TAKE YOUR CHANCE

Be a part of shaping a fast-growing industry and make an impact from day one. You’ll have the chance to take on responsibility early, with guidance and support from experienced mentors. We foster a learning culture, collaboration on equal footing, and quick decision-making that moves things forward.



Currently, we’re proceeding only with candidates authorized to work in Germany or who already hold a Job Seeker Visa.




ABOUT US

At Bettermile, we believe delivery shouldn’t be business as usual. We’re transforming last-mile logistics to drive efficiency and create a better delivery experience for everyone.

Our geo-based, AI-powered SaaS product handles complex address processing, dynamic routing, and navigation. It is built to manage many stops and multiple constraints.

We’re setting a new standard for the last mile and pushing the industry forward, powered by a skilled, international team of tech enthusiasts, logistics experts, and a product suite designed to keep evolving.

source_jobs.title: Working Student User Operations & Insights (d/f/m)
source_jobs.description:
WHAT IS WORKING AT BETTERMILE LIKE?

 - 🌟 We have a very supportive and appreciative working environment with a lot of autonomy, a flat hierarchy, and professional growth possibilities.

 - 🌍 We mean diversity and we put it in numbers: 29 languages, 32 nationalities, 42% female (vs. ø26% in tech industry), and yes, we do have Schlager-Fans among us.

 - 🚀 You can quickly take on responsibility without feeling left alone. Your team is always at your side.

 - 🎨 We mean it when we say “cutting edge” and have a high level of creational freedom in our everyday work.

 - 🏢 We work in a hybrid mode with weekly team days for better collaboration and nurturing interpersonal connections. When onsite - we work in a modern kid & pet-friendly Better Space in the heart of Berlin-Kreuzberg.

 - ✈️ Remote work from anywhere for up to 12 weeks in total in a year.

 - 🛌 Enjoy 27 vacation days (with a 5-day week model)

 - 🍎 Regular team breakfasts, fitness & wellness classes, company runs, and other events. Fruits, snacks, drinks, and coffee with a variety of milk are a given - but yes, we have them.

 - 💡 Outstanding flexibility we are proud of – and of course, the best colleagues in the world!



About the User Insights & Support Team:

Our team is like a navigation system for the successful experience of our users.

We don't just improve performance. We consider individual needs to provide customized training and resources tailored specifically to our clients. Interaction is at the heart of what we do. We look forward to answering questions and getting to the bottom of uncertainties.

We are proud to have an open door for feedback, because our customers' opinions drive change and improvement. We have a few pre-defined solutions, because we believe that every path should be unique.

The UsIS team is more than ‘just’ support. We are comrades-in-arms, believing in the vision and encouraging each other to take each step with confidence.




YOU WILL BE TAKING CARE OF

 - Supporting daily operational activities, including ticket handling and structured documentation

 - Supporting quality monitoring, reporting, and continuous improvement initiatives

 - Performing functional checks before releases and coordinating user-focused feedback to product teams

 - Building and maintaining strong relationships with users and acting as their advocate internally

 - Creating, maintaining, and improving FAQs, help center content, and internal documentation

 - Gaining deep insight into how a fast-growing SaaS product operates in real customer environments, with your observations directly influencing product improvements and user experience





YOU CHECK THESE BOXES

 - You are organized, detail-oriented, and work in a structured way

 - You have a proactive, solution-oriented mindset and stay calm in fast-paced situations

 - You enjoy taking ownership and contributing to operational stability

 - You have strong communication skills and feel comfortable collaborating across teams

 - You are curious and driven to understand problems deeply, improve processes, and help make the product better every day

 - You are fluent in English (C1 minimum); German or any additional language is a plus




IT IS AWESOME IF YOU ALSO HAVE

 - First experience in support, operations, or process management

 - Experience with documentation tools (e.g., Confluence) or ticketing systems

 - An interest in user experience, product development, or quality improvement


TAKE YOUR CHANCE

Be a part of shaping a fast-growing industry and make an impact from day one. You’ll have the chance to take on responsibility early, with guidance and support from experienced mentors. We foster a learning culture, collaboration on equal footing, and quick decision-making that moves things forward.



Currently, we’re proceeding only with candidates authorized to work in Germany or who already hold a Job Seeker Visa.




ABOUT US

At Bettermile, we believe delivery shouldn’t be business as usua

source_jobs.title: Senior Data Scientist - Geocoding (d/f/m)
source_jobs.description:
WHAT IS WORKING AT BETTERMILE LIKE?

 - We mean it when we say “cutting edge” and have a high level of creative freedom in our everyday work.

 - You will be surrounded by like-minded, driven, skilled, and highly motivated people who are keen to contribute to successful solutions.

 - We mean diversity, and we put it in numbers: 130+ people, 36 languages, 35% female (vs. ø26% in the tech industry), ø33 years of age, and yes, we do have Schlager-Fans among us.

 - We have a very supportive and appreciative working environment with a lot of autonomy, a flat hierarchy, and professional growth possibilities.

 - We work in a hybrid mode, with weekly team days for better collaboration and nurturing interpersonal connections. When onsite, we work in a modern, kid- and pet-friendly Better Space in the heart of Berlin-Kreuzberg.

 - Remote work from anywhere for up to 12 weeks in total per year.

 - 30 vacation days in a 5-day/week working model.

 - Kindergarten grant and a Company Pension scheme.

 - Regular team breakfasts, fitness & wellness classes, company runs, and other events. Fruits, snacks, drinks, and coffee with a variety of milk are a given - but yes, we have them.

 - Outstanding flexibility we are proud of – and, of course, the best colleagues in the world!

About the team:

Location services are at the heart of any delivery experience, and the Features team of Better Places tribe is building a world-class solution that integrates multiple providers to get accurate geocoding, enables geocode corrections, and serves relevant information about addresses worldwide. We use open-source and proprietary data and algorithms to build a highly scalable system that serves billions of requests.




YOU WILL BE TAKING CARE OF:

 - Driving the evolution of our geocoding systems from rule-based logic to ML-based matching and normalization.

 - Building and improving confidence and relevance scoring models, including automated false-positive detection.

 - Developing and productionizing data-driven solutions to improve geocoding quality.

 - Automating benchmarking and evaluation pipelines to measure model performance.

 - Driving cross-team initiatives, contributing to the long-term data strategy, and mentoring more junior data scientists.




YOU CHECK THESE BOXES:

 - 5+ years of experience in Data Science with a proven track record of productionizing complex models and tackling geospatial data challenges.

 - Strong skills in Python and SQL, combined with hands-on experience in AWS (Athena, Sagemaker), Snowflake, and dbt.

 - Practical experience with data orchestration tools (e.g. Airflow or Dagster) and data visualization via Metabase or Quicksight.

 - Ability to autonomously develop new strategies from scratch and identify high-impact opportunities within vast datasets.

 - Strong ownership mindset and communication skills to drive cross-functional projects and mentor team members.




IT IS AWESOME IF YOU ALSO HAVE:

 - Hands-on experience or a deep interest in applying LLMs and modern AI-driven features in a product environment.


TAKE YOUR CHANCE

Be a part of shaping a fast-growing industry and make an impact from day one. You’ll have the chance to take on responsibility early, with guidance and support from experienced mentors. We foster a learning culture, collaboration on equal footing, and quick decision-making that moves things forward.



Currently, we’re proceeding only with candidates authorized to work in Germany or who already hold a Job Seeker Visa.




ABOUT US

At Bettermile, we believe delivery shouldn’t be business as usual. We’re transforming last-mile logistics to drive efficiency and create a better delivery experience for everyone.

Our geo-based, AI-powered SaaS product handles complex address processing, dynamic routing, and navigation. It is built to manage many stops and multiple constraints.

We’re setting a new standard for the last mile and pushing the industry forward, powered by a skilled, inter
